candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue label; matches Net sales values and is the most standard revenue line.
Not revenue; this is cost line.
Operating expense, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Finished goods & goods for resale, new sales
candidates.why: Inventory balance sheet item, not revenue.
Liability balance, not reported revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total revenue line from the candidate list.

candidates.why: Direct COGS label, but appears duplicated/split in the statement across rows.
Component/subsplit of COGS rather than the main reported COGS line.
Explicit aggregate COGS/cost of revenues line; semantically strongest single reported line.

variables.notes: Chose the explicit aggregate COGS line to avoid duplicated/split 'Cost of goods sold' rows.

candidates.why: Explicit SG&A label exists, but preview is empty; per rule this can still be selected and supplemented if coverage looks incomplete.
Contains D&A embedded in SGA and should be excluded from XSGA components.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Candidate list appears to miss the populated overhead component rows. Per XSGA rule, included explicit 'Selling, General & Admin' plus populated overhead buckets 'Sales costs' and 'Administration costs' for coverage. Excluded 'Depreciation/Amortization in SGA' because D&A must be excluded. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Sales costs, [Income Statement] Administration costs

candidates.why: Explicit R&D expense line and appears to be the main reported amount.
Smaller subcomponent/detail line, not the main reported R&D expense.
Empty/other detail, not preferred over explicit main line.

candidates.row_label: Research and development costs - Balancing value
candidates.why: Balancing row; excluded by rule when main line exists.

variables.notes: Used priority list for changing labels over time, preferring the explicit main R&D expense line and then the alternate detail label.

candidates.row_label: Interest expense and financial exchange rate losses

Direct label but preview empty; still a valid fallback if populated historically.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest component, not total interest expense.
Balance sheet accrual, not income statement interest expense.

final_choice.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
Interest expense and financial exchange rate losses

variables.notes: Priority list prefers the cleanest pure interest-expense label, then direct fallback label, then broader finance-loss label if needed.

candidates.why: Includes non-controlling interests, so less preferred for BE when owner equity exists.
